scripts.build: node ../../packages/scripts/images/convert-webp.mjs && node ../../packages/scripts/build-search-index.mjs && node ../../packages/scripts/build-search-translations.mjs && next build && node ../../packages/scripts/build-all.mjs --base-url=https://sinotradecompliance.com --out-dir=out && node ../../packages/scripts/clean-rsc.js && node ../../packages/scripts/check-hardcoded.mjs --ci && node ../../packages/scripts/check-translations.mjs --short
